AI Boost
Achievement · July 2026

AI Boost Success 🏆

Several members of our team recently completed AI Boost, Accenture's AI training program. We are proud to share that our team secured all three podium positions in the final challenge.

Congratulations to Felipe Antúnez (1st), Álex Isasi (2nd), and María Mollet (3rd) on this fantastic achievement! They will soon share their experience and key learnings with the rest of the team.

02  ·  Recap June
Monthly summary

The most highlighted of June 2026

Congratulations on Your Promotion!

Congratulations to Óscar Coca, Ariadna Vallverdú, and Juliette Navarre on their well-deserved promotions!

This achievement reflects your dedication, hard work, and the impact you make every day. We are proud to celebrate this milestone with you and wish you continued success in your new roles.

Barcelona's Summer Dinner

What a fantastic evening in Barcelona!

A big thank you to everyone who joined and made it such a great experience. It was a perfect opportunity to celebrate everything we've achieved during the first half of the year, reconnect outside of work, and kick off the summer season together.

We gathered at Restaurante Xiroi, one of Barcelona's most iconic seaside spots, where we enjoyed great tapas, delicious arròs, and even better company.

Looking forward to the next one in Madrid on July 9!

Summer Day Highlights

On June 24, we came together to celebrate our Summer Day, enjoying a great afternoon filled with fun, laughter, and team spirit.

A big thank you to everyone who joined and helped make the event such a success!

🎉 Congratulations to our winners:

Ana and Antonino, who each won a WonderBox.
Celia, who was the lucky winner of the Bingo.

Take a look at some of our favorite moments from the day in the photo gallery below. Here's to many more celebrations together!

Team Signature Template

As part of our efforts to continue building a stronger team identity, we've created a shared email signature template for everyone.

A consistent signature not only gives us a more professional and unified image, but also reflects the sense of team and collaboration that defines us.

As a reminder, the HTML file and installation instructions were sent by email. If you haven't updated yours yet, now is a great time to do it.

2. Everything Claude 🧠
⚡
Claude Code — June Updates
Claude Code · v2.1.172+ · June 2026
Now Available
⚠️
Version required: v2.1.172 or later. Run claude --version to check yours. If below, update Claude Code before trying these features.
🤖 Nested Sub-agents — up to 5 levels

Sub-agents can now spawn their own sub-agents, up to 5 levels deep. Each level runs with its own model, prompt and tools — delegate complex tasks across a full agent hierarchy.

/agents → see all running sessions
depth 1 → triage-lead (Opus)
depth 2 → repro-runner (Sonnet)
depth 3 → log-summariser (Haiku)
🔀 Dynamic Workflows

Opus 4.8 is now the default model in Claude Code. Dynamic Workflows let you orchestrate large tasks across hundreds of parallel sub-agents — each traced in the Claude Console.

💡 Use /effort xhigh for harder tasks requiring deeper reasoning.
💭 Dreaming — Agents that improve over time

A scheduled background process that reviews past agent sessions, surfaces patterns, and curates memory — so agents improve between runs. Recurring mistakes and shared workflows get pulled into a more useful memory store automatically.

🚀 Fast Mode — 2.5× faster, 3× cheaper

Fast mode on Opus 4.8 runs 2.5× faster than before and is now 3× cheaper than fast mode on previous models — making high-speed agentic work much more accessible within your spend limit.

💡 Great for iterative tasks where speed matters more than depth.
📢 Known Issue — Increase Not Reflecting Immediately

There is an active issue on Anthropic's end where users who have been granted an increase may not see it reflected right away.

  • If you received a confirmation email, verify at: Name/Logo (bottom left) → Settings → Usage
  • If still blocked: log out using the specific "Log Out" option and log back in
  • If still not showing: wait 1 hour and try again
  • Still not working? Submit a ServiceNow ticket under the Claude Enterprise support category
⚠️
Claude Fable 5 — Not Available on Accenture Enterprise
Anthropic · claude-fable-5 · Early Access Only
Restricted

Anthropic has announced Claude Fable 5 — part of the new "Mythos class" of models — as one of their most powerful releases yet. However, this model is not currently available through the Accenture Claude Enterprise plan.

🔒
Early Access only
Access to Fable 5 (Mythos class) is currently gated via a separate waitlist — not included in standard Enterprise plans.
✅
What we do have
Accenture Enterprise users have access to Claude Opus 4.8 — Anthropic's current top-tier model available to enterprise accounts.
📌 We will communicate as soon as Fable 5 / Mythos class models are available within the Accenture Enterprise agreement. Watch this newsletter for updates.
🗓️
Routines — Scheduled Cloud Agents, Now Enabled
Claude Code · /schedule skill · June 2026
New ✓

Claude Code now lets you set up Routines — recurring cloud agents that run on a schedule, without you needing to be present. Think of them as automated colleagues that execute a task at a set time and report back. Set it once, and it runs every day, every week, or at any interval you define.

🔁
What is a Routine?
A prompt or slash command that Claude runs automatically on a cron schedule — daily, weekly, or custom. Results are delivered back to you.
☁️
Runs in the cloud
Routines execute even when your computer is off — they run on Anthropic's infrastructure and notify you when done.
💡
What can you automate?
Weekly project summaries, automated status reports, recurring research briefs, monitoring tasks — anything you currently do manually on a schedule.
⚙️
How to set one up
In Claude Code, use the /schedule skill — describe the task, set the interval, and Claude handles the rest.
💡 Example: "Every Monday at 8am, summarise last week's project updates from my notes and send me a briefing." — set it with /schedule and forget about it.
🎙️
AI Tip: Save Tokens with Whisper
Local transcription · No tokens consumed
Tip ✓

Need to transcribe a recording? Instead of using Claude, you can use the attached Whisper app to generate transcripts locally — without consuming AI tokens. Simply install the app, select your audio file, choose the output location and format (TXT or PDF), and your transcript will be ready in just a few clicks.

Team Claude Skills Repository
dataistrategy-claude-skills-repo · by Felipe Antunez
Active
⚙️ Pre-requisites
Claude Code License
Request: go.accenture.com/ClaudeLicenseGeneral
GitHub account
Sign up at github.com/signup with your Accenture email
🚀 Setup — 4 steps
1
Send your GitHub username to felipe.antunez@accenture.com
2
Accept invite, then run in Claude Code:
git clone https://github.com/felipeantunezaccenture/dataistrategy-claude-skills-repo.git "$HOME/.claude/shared-skills-repo"
cp -r "$HOME/.claude/shared-skills-repo/.claude/skills/"* "$HOME/.claude/skills/"
3
Restart Claude Code
4
Type /team-skills → A — Status to verify sync
📂 Available Skills
Team skills from GitHub
/accenture-brand
Applies Accenture brand guidelines to any deliverable: websites, copy, slides, emails, dashboards
/brand-skill-generator
Generates a complete brand skill for any company from logos, brand documents and a website URL
/business-case
Orchestrates business case creation: KPI selection, content generation and Excel report building
/credential-generator
Generates a consulting credential (PPTX + JSON) from PDF, DOCX or PPTX source files using Azure OpenAI
/data-governance
Performs end-to-end SAP Data Governance from a CSV/Excel dataset: classifies fields, generates catalogue, SQL queries and lineage map
/claude-setup
Configures your Claude Code environment in ~/.claude/ — interviews you, audits current state and implements improvements
▶
▶ Video Demo
Connecting to Feli's Repo · by Felipe
3. ChatGPT 💬
🖼️
How to create slides in ChatGPT — as images
ChatGPT Enterprise · GPT-Image-2
NEW ✓

ChatGPT's new image model (GPT-Image-2) crossed a quality threshold where you can now generate full slide visuals, infographics and process maps as images — sharp text, structured layouts, any aspect ratio up to 2K. Great for client materials and deck visuals when you need something fast.

📊
Slide visuals & infographics
Full slide images with sharp text, icons and structured layouts from a prompt.
🗺️
Process maps & frameworks
2x2 matrices, process flows, org charts — rendered as clean images.
🌐
Up to 8 consistent images
Generate a full deck batch from one prompt — consistent style across all slides.
📐
Any aspect ratio, up to 2K
Wide 16:9 slides, square thumbnails, portrait covers — export-ready for PowerPoint.
⚡ Try this: "Create a professional consulting slide visual: a 2x2 matrix comparing [X vs Y] on [axis 1] and [axis 2]. Use Accenture purple tones, clean sans-serif, minimal design. 16:9 aspect ratio."
4. AI News 📰
⚡ Gemini 3.1 — Now Available for all Accenture users!
Google Gemini Enterprise · June 2026
Now GA ✓

The Gemini 3.1 model has officially reached General Availability and is now fully enabled for all Accenture users. Frontier-class performance, advanced reasoning and highly efficient processing — directly in your enterprise workflows.

⚡
Blazing Speed & Efficiency
2.5× faster Time to First Token and 45% increase in output speed vs Gemini 2.5 Flash.
🧠
Advanced Reasoning & Agentic Skills
Vastly improved software engineering, codebase analysis and stronger agentic capabilities.
🎬
Enhanced Multimodal Analysis
Native video & audio support — analyse recorded meetings without preprocessing.
🎨
Code-Based Visual Assets
Generate animated SVGs from text prompts — build dashboards & visual assets (3.1 Pro).
🤔
Want to choose a specific model? Gemini Enterprise auto-selects the best one — but click "Auto" at the bottom of the chat window to pick from the full list.
Gemini Agent Builder — Now Available
Google Gemini Enterprise · Google I/O 2026
New

Gemini now lets you build and deploy AI agents with no code — create subagents, select models for each task, and orchestrate multi-step workflows directly from the Gemini interface.

🤖
Build agents, no code
Create agents and subagents visually, define their tasks and chain them together.
🧠
Select your model
Choose which Gemini model powers each agent — Flash for speed, Pro for complex reasoning.
🔗
Connectors — heads up
Connectors are currently blocked from Accenture — you can build agents but cannot connect to external data sources yet.
🎬
See it in action
▶ Watch: Gemini Agent Builder walkthrough
Gemini Omni — Images & Video Generation
Google I/O 2026 · Gemini Enterprise
New

Announced at Google I/O 2026, Gemini Omni is Google's new multimodal model that can generate images and high-quality video from any combination of text, images, audio and video input — and lets you edit results through conversation.

🎬 Video from any input
Combine text, images, audio or existing video to generate new content grounded in Gemini's knowledge.
💬 Edit through conversation
Refine your video or image output by simply describing what to change — no separate editing tool needed.
🔒 SynthID watermark
All AI-generated content is watermarked with Google's SynthID to enable easy AI detection.
⚠️ Enterprise availability TBC — Gemini Omni was announced at I/O but full rollout to Accenture Enterprise accounts is pending. We'll update when it's confirmed.
claude
Claude Opus 4.8 — Just Released
Anthropic · May 28, 2026 · Same pricing as 4.7
Now Available

Anthropic describes Claude Opus 4.8 as having "sharper judgement, more honesty about its progress, and the ability to work independently for longer than its predecessors." It arrives just 41 days after Opus 4.7 — and at the same price.

🎯
Sharper & more reliable
4× less likely than its predecessor to leave flaws in its own code unremarked. More likely to flag uncertainty, less likely to make unsupported claims.
⚡
Fast mode: 2.5× speed, 3× cheaper
Fast mode runs 2.5× as fast and is now 3× cheaper than fast mode for previous models.
🤖
Dynamic Workflows (preview)
Designed to help larger models like Opus manage complex tasks across hundreds of parallel subagents.
📈
Better across the board
Improved results for coding, agent work, reasoning and knowledge work vs Opus 4.7.
🔭 Coming next: Anthropic hinted that Mythos-class models will become broadly available in the coming weeks — watch this space.

5. Tool Enterprise Access 🔑

Google Gemini Enterprise

Gemini
Enterprise

Our team now has access to Google Gemini Enterprise — a key enabler to operate as AI-powered consultants.

To activate:
  • Log in to Gemini Enterprise
  • Review Legal Responsible Use guidelines and complete the Consent Agreement within 2 weeks
  • If needed, request a GCP license via Technology Support
⏳ Activation may take 24–48 hours. If issues persist, raise a support ticket.

ChatGPT Enterprise

ChatGPT
Enterprise

Available for Strategy & Consulting, including interns. Advanced reasoning, persistent Projects and executive-ready outputs.

To get access:
  • New license: Request via official process
  • Already licensed: Update WBS to CIW68001 — How to change WBS
🔑 Request new license 📋 How to change WBS

Claude Enterprise

claude
Enterprise

Claude is Anthropic's AI assistant — strong at long-document analysis, structured writing, coding and complex reasoning. Limited licenses — approval from L7+ required + WBS code needed.

⚠️ WBS code required to request access.
🔑 Request license — Software Catalog 🚀 Log in to Claude 💻 Install Claude Desktop

For questions, visit the Accenture Claude Enterprise Community on Viva Engage or email: DAIM.Platform.Learn@accenture.com

05  ·  Miguelín Guide
Picks of the month

The Miguelín Guide

Each month, in this section, our partners Miguel (representing Madrid) and Jaime (representing Barcelona) will recommend us some of their favorite restaurants of the city.

Madrid
Barcelona
❤️ Date Night  ·  Low Lights, High Stakes

GOEN

An authentic Japanese izakaya made for sharing. Think charcoal-grilled skewers, fresh sashimi, comforting small plates, and a carefully curated sake selection—all served in a warm, intimate setting that makes you want to linger a little longer.

🍽️ Friends & Family  ·  Loud Table Club

Castelados

The kind of place made for sharing. Fresh seafood, generous Spanish classics, and dishes like tuna belly millefeuille and slow-cooked oxtail are best enjoyed around a full table with good company.

🍷 Bar & Aperitivo  ·  Just One (Lie)

Snake Bar

Come for one drink, stay for three. Signature cocktails inspired by iconic songs, shareable comfort food, and a warm retro atmosphere make it the perfect spot to kick off the night—or accidentally end it there.

❤️ Date Night  ·  Low Lights, High Stakes

Sato i Tanaka

An intimate omakase experience where every seat feels like the best in the house. Quiet, beautifully crafted, and perfect for a special night that deserves your full attention.

🍽️ Friends & Family  ·  Loud Table Club

Casa Ràfols

Big tables, Catalan comfort food, and a lively atmosphere made for sharing. Come with a group, order generously, and settle in for a long evening of great food and even better conversation.

🍷 Bar & Aperitivo  ·  Just One (Lie)

Paradiso

You tell yourself it's just one cocktail, then the menu, the atmosphere, and the creativity convince you otherwise. One of Barcelona's iconic bars for starting the night—and rarely ending it after a single drink.
